zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Feig於1591年7月30日出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩時，她的父親Elias Feig47歲，母親Magdalena44歲。她於1613年7月20日與Christoph Gaertner在德國福萊斯塔阿特 薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1639年5月21日享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Feig于1591年7月30日出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩时，她的父亲Elias Feig47岁，母亲Magdalena44岁。她于1613年7月20日与Christoph Gaertner在德国福萊斯塔阿特 薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1639年5月21日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Feig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Ephraim, Eran, Menachem, Nachman, Yehuda.  German Hans, Irmgard.
South German: nickname from Middle High German veic ‘fated to die’, which subsequently took on the meaning ‘easily intimidated, fearful’.

variants.name: Feige
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frankl, Gerhard, Hans, Manfred.
German: topographic name for someone who lived by a fig tree, or metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of figs, from Middle High German vīge (Old High German fīga, from Latin ficus).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Feig was born on 30 July 1591, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, her father, Elias Feig, was 47 and her mother, Magdalena, was 44. She married Christoph Gaertner on 20 July 1613, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 21 May 1639, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Feig est née le 30 juillet 1591, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Elias Feig, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Magdalena, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Christoph Gaertner le 20 juillet 1613, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 mai 1639, à l’âge de 47 ans.

Juli 1613 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Deutschland Christoph Gaertner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Mai 1639 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Feig è nata il il 30 luglio 1591 nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Elias Feig, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Magdalena, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Christoph Gaertner il 20 luglio 1613, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1639, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Feigが1591年7月30日にドイツフレイスタアト サチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサで生まれた時，父Elias Feigは47歳，母Magdalenaは44歳であった。1613年7月20日にドイツフレイスタアト サチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサでChristoph Gaertnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1639年5月21日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Feig(이)가 1591년 7월 30일 독일 프레이스타앳 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Elias Feig(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Magdalena(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1613년 7월 20일 독일 프레이스타앳 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Christoph Gaertner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 5월 21일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Feig nasceu em 30 de julho de 1591, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Elias Feig, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Magdalena, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Christoph Gaertner em 20 de julho de 1613, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de maio de 1639, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Feig родилась 30 июля 1591 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, фристаат сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Elias Feig было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdalena, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christoph Gaertner 20 июля 1613 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, фристаат сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 21 мая 1639 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Feig nació el 30 de julio de 1591, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Elias Feig, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Magdalena, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Christoph Gaertner el 20 de julio de 1613, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1639, a la edad de 47 años.
